name: Marsirius AI Labs
summary: Marsirius AI Labs is an AI and breakthrough-technology company focused on healthcare diagnostics, AI-powered applications, and quantum research, with public products/initiatives including duAIcheck, GELA AI, SHEEP, Marsbot, and Quantact.

claims.claim: Marsirius AI Labs operates an official website at marsirius.ai describing AI-powered diagnostic automation and breakthrough-technology work.
duAIcheck is presented as an AI diagnostic platform with pay-per-scan access to medical AI models.
GELA AI is a Marsirius AI Labs app for real-time border traffic.
Marsirius AI Labs is associated with Nicosia, Cyprus and Dubai, UAE.
Marsirius publishes SHEEP, described as cognitive memory for AI.
Marsirius publishes Quantact, a quantum-randomness pattern research initiative.

products.name: duAIcheck
products.description: AI-assisted diagnosis platform; public page references PACS integration and pay-per-scan positioning.

products.name: GELA AI
products.description: Real-time AI border traffic app with iOS/App Store and Google Play presence.

products.name: Marsbot
products.description: Autonomous AI executive described on the Marsirius website.

products.name: Quantact
products.description: Research initiative claiming analysis of structured patterns in quantum-generated randomness.
